full_text: Starc to Hasaranga, Caught by Wade!! The move to persist with Starc works wonders for Finch and Australia. Superb captaincy. It's equally poor batting though from the Lankans. No game awareness from Hasaranga at all. Just escaped last ball and this time, the fielder at gully was moved to a conventional first slip. Yet, he went chasing at the away-angler, driving with zero footwork and got a tiny feather through to Wade. Hasaranga went for the review straightaway. He didn't think he had nicked it but UltraEdge showed that there was a spike as the ball passed the bat. That's the end of that then.

full_text: Zampa to Avishka Fernando, Caught by Smith!! Terrible shot! Having just lost two set batters in quick succession, the last thing SL wanted was to lose another wicket. Zampa kept looping them up, hoping for the bait to be taken and young Avishka can't resist on this occasion. Looks for a swipe across the line, but gets defeated by the turn on the leg break. Slices it straight up, towards the extra cover region where Smith has positioned himself to do the rest. Waste of a wicket! The Aussies won't mind though, they're putting in the squeeze here.
